svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(44, 62, 80), rgb(173, 188, 204)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(26, 37, 47), rgb(198, 208, 216));

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
